message:
feat(dashboard,protection): safe refresh anchor + symlink-aware path normalization

WhiteDuck (bd-mlm): Replace checked_sub().unwrap() with safe fallback in
dashboard refresh anchor. Prevents panic when refresh duration exceeds
Instant epoch.

RedWren (bd-3ok): Normalize marker and query paths through canonicalize()
in protection internals. Prevents symlink alias mismatches in marker
registration, discovery, and removal. Fixes clippy map_unwrap_or lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
